title: Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
author: Robert C. Martin
excerpt: Divided into principles, patterns, and practices of writing clean code with case studies. Covers meaningful names, small functions, comments, formatting, error handling, unit testing, and classes.
whoShouldRead: Readers interested in Computer Science and Programming and Software Engineering
keyIdeas: Central thesis of Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
keyTakeaways: Understand the core argument and its implications
